review: The Lo-Fi Dusk set is exactly the calm palette I was hoping for. The dusty lavender alphas look incredible under warm light and the PBT texture is lovely. Legends are crisp and the thick walls feel premium. Shipped well-packed with foam. Will be back for the Nord set!

Terminal Green is a developer's dream. The phosphor legends against the dark olive base give my board that perfect retro CRT vibe. Doubleshot legends feel like they'll never fade. Arrived faster than the estimate and packaged with care. Highly recommend.

The Forest Canopy diorama cap is tiny and absolutely magical - a little world on my Escape key. Giving 4 stars only because there was a faint bubble in the resin near one edge. Not visible when mounted but I noticed it up close. Seller was quick to reply and offered options.

Nord Frost is gorgeous in person. The pale blue-grey and navy combo is so clean on my 65% build. The galaxy spacebar I ordered alongside it is a total showstopper - every guest comments on it. Worth the wait for made-to-order. KeebCraftCo nailed it.

The Tokyo Night deskmat transformed my whole setup. The neon skyline is vivid and the stitched edges are super clean. Mouse tracking is smooth and the rubber base doesn't budge. Seller was great about confirming the size before shipping. Love it!

Beautiful Terminal Green set with great legends. The amber accent keys are a nice touch. One of the mods had a slightly rough edge that needed a quick pass with a file, but nothing major once installed. Looks fantastic on my board and the candle they tucked in smelled amazing.

This coiled cable is the finishing touch my desk needed. The aviator connector feels solid and the coil holds its shape perfectly. Picked the charcoal colorway and the sleeving is tight and even. Made to order but worth every day of the wait. Highly recommend.

The Cedar & Cold Brew candle smells exactly like my favorite coffee shop. Clean burn, no soot, and the amber jar is reusable. Tossed this in with a keycap order as a treat and it might be my favorite part. Will reorder for sure.

This nebula spacebar is the hero of my build. The purple and blue swirls with the little starlight flecks catch the light beautifully. Stabilizer stems fit my board perfectly with no wobble. Packaged like a piece of art. Absolutely thrilled.

The Lo-Fi Dusk set is genuinely beautiful, but a couple of the alphas arrived with a slight color mismatch compared to the listing photos. I reached out and the seller was responsive about a return, but I was disappointed after the long made-to-order wait. Hoping the exchange resolves it.

Came back for the Tokyo Night deskmat after loving my diorama keycap. Just as great as expected - the colors are punchy and the cloth top is smooth for fast mouse movements. The seller clearly cares about every order. A repeat customer for life.

As someone picky about minimal sets, Nord Frost delivers. The frosted accents and clean legends look perfect on my 75%. PBT feels thick and durable. Communication was excellent throughout the made-to-order process. Couldn't be happier with this keyset.

Bought the Cedar & Cold Brew candle as a birthday gift for my mom and added a personalized note - she loved it. The cedar and coffee scent is cozy without being overwhelming and the jar looks great on her desk. Shipping to Sacramento was right on time. Will order again for the holidays.

The Molten Lava cap on my Esc key is exactly the accent my build needed - the orange swirls really glow against the charcoal base. MX stem fit my switches snugly with no wobble. Ordered the Amber Honeycomb and switch tester in the same order and both were just as nice. Fast, careful packaging. Easily my favorite keycap shop.

Huge deskmat, vivid print, and the stitched edges feel like they'll hold up forever. Covers my whole desk with room to spare. The neon really pops next to my RGB. Shipped quickly and arrived in perfect shape. Great value for the size.

Second cable from KeebCraftCo and it's flawless. Went with a lavender coil this time to match my deskmat and the sleeving is immaculate. The aviator disconnect makes packing my board for trips so much easier. Great maker, great communication.

The Lo-Fi Dusk set is the perfect companion for late-night coding sessions. Calm, muted, and easy on the eyes. The peach accents are a lovely surprise in person. Thick PBT, zero shine after weeks of use. Shipping was right on the estimate. Five stars.

The Deep Ocean Reef cap is mesmerizing - the translucent teal layers really do look like a reef under water. Pairs perfectly with my Tokyo Night deskmat. Each cap is unique and mine has the prettiest swirl. Quick shipping and lovely packaging.

Bought the switch tester to figure out what I like before building my first board. Brilliant idea, solidly assembled, and the clear caps let you really feel each switch. Helped me settle on tactiles. Came bundled with a set order and everything arrived perfectly. Great for beginners.

The Amber Honeycomb cap is stunning under warm desk light - the little hand-painted bee detail is adorable. Resin is clear and bubble-free and the MX stem fit perfectly. Made to order but worth it. Such a charming accent piece. Thank you!

Terminal Green full kit covered every key on my board and then some. The phosphor legends are razor sharp and the olive base is a deep, rich color. Threw in a B-grade cap on sale too which is honestly perfect for a spare. Fast turnaround. Will buy again.

The mini cassette novelty cap is pure nostalgia - the hand-detailed label is so charming. Sits great on my Esc and always gets a smile from anyone who sees my desk. Tucked into a larger order and packaged carefully. A lovely little piece.
